description: Verso: Accounts in Arabic with Greek/Coptic alphanumerals, mostly crossed out. Some accounts are also visible on the recto where the paper has been reused for a Judaeo-Arabic halakhic text discussing kashrut. (Information in part from FGP).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
